rationale: Keep: the cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing paper’s stated prior-work positioning, since both notes emphasize shifting WOM research from consequences/network structure to psychological drivers of what gets talked/shared. The cited study’s core constructs (product-level drivers, immediate vs ongoing WOM, visibility/cues) plausibly serve as a direct theoretical/comparative foundation for the citing paper’s virality mechanism work, so this is not an obvious incidental mention.
